headline: M&T Bank Gains Nearly 13% in 6 Months: How to Play the Stock Now?
summary: MTB stock rises 12.8% in six months, can strong growth, buybacks and AI initiatives keep the rally going, or is it time to wait for a better entry?

headline: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: M&T Bank (MTB) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
